tasks.label: cli-build
tasks.detail: Build plugin and copy it to the local Decky plugin folder
tasks.command: flatpak-spawn --host bash -lc "cd '${workspaceFolder}' && if command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm run build; elif command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm build; else echo 'pnpm/npm not found on SteamOS host'; exit 127; fi"

tasks.label: build
tasks.detail: Build plugin and copy it into the local Decky plugin folder

tasks.label: updatefrontendlib
tasks.command: flatpak-spawn --host bash -lc 'if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm update decky-frontend-lib --latest; elif command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm update decky-frontend-lib; else echo "pnpm/npm not found on SteamOS host"; exit 127; fi'
